programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: On the third leg of their Italian adventure, Mike and Frank head south to Sicily where an American contact agrees to show them around. Later, the search is on for a very specific vintage Vespa.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Dale tries to purchase a dilapidated helicopter, an old pistol from the 1700s that probably does not even work anymore and a horse-racing carriage from the 19th century.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A man is face-to-face with a possibility of electrocution by live power after smashing into a light pole, leaving officers perplexed as to how the accident occurred.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: If a happy wife means a happy life then one man's in big trouble when he's suspected of driving under the influence of drugs. At stake is his job and big fines - but that is the least of his worries. Then, a standard ticket causes an aggressive reaction and a man speeding at double the limit claims he has a good reason but must convince the police first.

programme.title: The Force - Behind The Line
programme.desc: A woman's life is at risk and she doesn't know, a man on a boat goes overboard when confronted, and police close in on a stolen prestige car.

programme.title: The Force - Behind The Line
programme.desc: Police must act quickly when a desperate and dangerous bank robber is on the run.

programme.title: Desert Collectors
programme.desc: Nigel travels to the south coast of Western Australia to the beautiful town of Albany where he meets Phil, and it's E Type Jaguar heaven. Nigel gets to race an E Type Jaguar in the Albany Classic.

programme.title: Desert Collectors
programme.desc: Nigel travels to Perth, Western Australia, to catch up with Geoff and his incredible collection. From the bizarre to the macabre to the absolutely unbelievable, this collection will leave you spellbound.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick is contacted to restore a replica of an F-105 fighter jet. Will the crew be able to execute their plan of attack, or will they miss the mark and abort the mission?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Emily brings her mother along with her to Walnut, and Darrell wastes no time finding an advantage. Kenny gets some advice from a music legend, while Shana and Edwina settle for thrifting what's in front of them.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While in Texas, the guys find two once-in-a-lifetime automotive picking opportunities before meeting another collector with a meteorite and branding irons, and afterwards, a sprawling junkyard has an owner who is reluctant to sell.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Take your best shot with the Pawn Stars when Rick frames up a signed print of Ansel Adams' famous photograph.

programme.title: AFL Pre-Game
programme.desc: A look ahead at tonight's AFL game.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: The Dockers challenge the Hawks, live and free from Optus Stadium. Bounce time: 8:10 pm AEST.

programme.title: AFL Post Game
programme.desc: A look back at all the action from tonight's game.

programme.title: Kick Ons
programme.desc: Join the team as they debate the hottest AFL topics and preview the biggest games over the weekend. Sit back, relax and enjoy Kick Ons after the Footy!

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While in Texas, the guys find two once-in-a-lifetime automotive picking opportunities before meeting another collector with a meteorite and branding irons, and afterwards, a sprawling junkyard has an owner who is reluctant to sell.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick is contacted to restore a replica of an F-105 fighter jet. Will the crew be able to execute their plan of attack, or will they miss the mark and abort the mission?

programme.title: The Front Bar
programme.desc: Join Sam Pang, Mick Molloy and Andy Maher as they share a laugh about the world of AFL and catch up with stars of yesteryear and today.

programme.title: LIV Golf League
programme.desc: The 2026 LIV Golf Tour heads to Trump National Golf Club in Potomac Falls, USA. Catch all the action, live and free on 7 and 7plus.

programme.title: LIV Golf League
programme.desc: The 2026 LIV Golf Tour heads to Trump National Golf Club in Potomac Falls, USA. Catch all the action, live and free on 7 and 7plus.

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programme.desc: Troy and Pickle attempt to track down a giant python known as the Night Serpent. Meanwhile, Tess convinces Bill to try out new hunting grounds.

programme.title: Desert Collectors
programme.desc: Join The Desert Collectors as they travel the spectacular outback scenery steeped in history and heritage in search of unique treasures and meet the people who spend their lives collecting them.

programme.title: Desert Collectors
programme.desc: Nigel travels to the south coast of Western Australia to the beautiful town of Albany where he meets Phil, and it's E Type Jaguar heaven. Nigel gets to race an E Type Jaguar in the Albany Classic.

programme.title: Desert Collectors
programme.desc: Nigel travels to Perth, Western Australia, to catch up with Geoff and his incredible collection. From the bizarre to the macabre to the absolutely unbelievable, this collection will leave you spellbound.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick is contacted to restore a replica of an F-105 fighter jet. Will the crew be able to execute their plan of attack, or will they miss the mark and abort the mission?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Emily brings her mother along with her to Walnut, and Darrell wastes no time finding an advantage. Kenny gets some advice from a music legend, while Shana and Edwina settle for thrifting what's in front of them.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While in Texas, the guys find two once-in-a-lifetime automotive picking opportunities before meeting another collector with a meteorite and branding irons, and afterwards, a sprawling junkyard has an owner who is reluctant to sell.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Take your best shot with the Pawn Stars when Rick frames up a signed print of Ansel Adams' famous photograph.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Join the club with the Pawn Stars when a collection of Playboy Club memorabilia hops into the shop.

programme.title: Kick Ons
programme.desc: Join the team as they debate the hottest AFL topics and preview the biggest games over the weekend. Sit back, relax and enjoy Kick Ons after the Footy!

programme.title: STIHL TIMBERSPORTS
programme.desc: Follow Australia's top Timbersports athletes as they compete for the 2024 STIHL Timbersports Australian Championship and their chance to represent Australia at the World Championships in France.

programme.title: Desert Collectors
programme.desc: Nigel is on the road again heading to the beautiful Peel Region of Western Australia to meet up with Rodney and the best Shearing collection you will ever see, but it's not all about shearing.

programme.title: Desert Collectors
programme.sub-title: The Aussie Perentti & Nigel Buys Som
programme.desc: Nigel receives a call from Margaret asking if Nigel knows anyone who would be interested in Margaret's late husband Jock's Australian kit car, the Perentti. Nigel has a mate Andy who is very interested.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: A client's expectations are sky high when he agrees to a $10,000 restoration of his 1900s peanut roaster. Later, Ron buys a vintage English taxi and sets out to prove to Rick that it was worth the investment.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Hesperia, Calif., Mary's transportation troubles lead to her teaming up with Kenny and taking him out to pasture; Darrell shows the next generation of Gambler how it's done; the Vegas Ladies' mid-century style lets them write their own ticket.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The lads who find gold amongst America's trash meet an elderly artist who keeps a shrine to his ex-lovers! Danielle learns the boys' expensive secret.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Raise a glass with the Pawn Stars when Rick spots an authentic moonshine still.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: The Lions go up against the Blues , live and free from the Gabba. Bounce time: 7:30 pm AEST.

programme.title: AFL Post Game
programme.desc: A look back at all the action from tonight's game.

programme.title: GetOn Extra
programme.desc: Each week join Lizzie Jelfs, Matt Hill, Simon Marshall and Brent Zerafa as they dive headlong into the all the weekend's best racing to find you their best bets.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: Anaconda is an action-packed thriller starring JENNIFER LOPEZ (The Wedding Planner), rap superstar ICE CUBE (XXX: State of the Union), Academy Award®-winner JON VOIGHT (1978 Best Actor, Coming Home) and ERIC STOLTZ (Pulp Fiction). A documentary film crew, headed by anthropologist Steve Cale (Stoltz) and director Terri Flores (Lopez), ventures into the world's most isolated jungle.

programme.title: LIV Golf League
programme.desc: The 2026 LIV Golf Tour heads to Trump National Golf Club in Potomac Falls, USA. Catch all the action, live and free on 7 and 7plus.

programme.title: LIV Golf League
programme.desc: The 2026 LIV Golf Tour heads to Trump National Golf Club in Potomac Falls, USA. Catch all the action, live and free on 7 and 7plus.

programme.title: Merv Hughes Fishing
programme.desc: Merv Hughes Fishing is a light hearted fishing show with some ripping catches, a few yarns (mostly true), mateship and of course a splash of comedy thrown in.

programme.title: Charter Boat Wars 2: Port Phillip Bay
programme.desc: Skippers navigate challenging conditions and go head-to-head in competition on the open water, testing skill and resilience.

programme.title: Classic Restos
programme.desc: Through exclusive contacts in the USA, this program has been given access to a rarely seen collection of the Detroit Automotive Historical Society in Fort Wayne.

programme.title: Classic Restos
programme.desc: Fletch visits the Gilmore Heritage Center, the largest Museum in North America, comprising 180,000 sq ft of exhibition space set on 90 acres.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The lads who find gold amongst America's trash meet an elderly artist who keeps a shrine to his ex-lovers! Danielle learns the boys' expensive secret.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Raise a glass with the Pawn Stars when Rick spots an authentic moonshine still.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Stay awake with the Pawn Stars when an early, illustrated version of Rip Van Winkle is brought into the shop.

programme.title: The 4WD Adventure Show
programme.desc: Another reminder of why Australia is known as the lucky country - the outback never disappoints.

programme.title: Life Off Road
programme.desc: Life Off Road celebrates all aspects of four-wheel driving and off-roading.

programme.title: The Car Club
programme.desc: Amelia goes electric in a first for her, the old man washes cars for love not money, and a family day out with the Glitter Gang changes some minds when it comes to drifting.

programme.title: STIHL TIMBERSPORTS
programme.desc: Follow Australia's top Timbersports athletes as they compete for the 2024 STIHL Timbersports Australian Championship and their chance to represent Australia at the World Championships in France.

programme.title: Night Thunder
programme.desc: Night Thunder's high-speed thrills and intense racing action from Perth Motorplex, live and free, streaming on 7plus.
